case_title: HOWCRIO BURLEY VS. MANTSHA J BOIKANYO

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM SASHA CUMMINGS FILED BY BURLEY, HOWCRIO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.) SERVED APR-15-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-17-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY MANTSHA J BOIKANYO IS GRANTED.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED OCT-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURLEY, HOWCRIO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J $294.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $324.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $353.63 FILED BY BURLEY, HOWCRIO AS TO DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-20-2009 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-18-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J HEARING SET FOR JUL-17-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURLEY, HOWCRIO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PROVEN BY A PREPONDERANCE OF THE EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT IS RESPONSIBLE FOR THE DAMAGES CLAIMED FROM THE ALLEGED CONVERSION OF HIS PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT BOIKANYO, MANTSHA J ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2009 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO MAY-18-2009 AT 6:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: SASHA CUMMINGS. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
